sentences.arabic: تَنَاوُلُ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِلصِّحَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Jedenje povrća i voća je veoma važno za zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Eating vegetables and fruits is very important for health.

sentences.arabic: أُفَضِّلُ أَكْلَ سَلَطَةٍ طَازَجَةٍ مَعَ كُلِّ وَجْبَةِ غَدَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Više volim jesti svježu salatu uz svaki ručak.
sentences.translationEn: I prefer eating a fresh salad with every lunch meal.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ أَبِي إِنَّ التَّمْرَ هُوَ أَفْضَلُ حَلْوَى طَبِيعِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Moj otac kaže da su hurme najbolji prirodni slatkiš.
sentences.translationEn: My father says that dates are the best natural dessert.
